rationale: Hermes 4 is the newest NousResearch frontier release (Aug 2025).
70B variant: best architecture-recovery / footprint trade for glyph-routing absorb — config + tokenizer alone is ~tens of MB, well under P1 ≤100MB budget.

405B is unnecessary: absorb path takes routing pattern (config + tokenizer + skill atoms), NOT weights. 70B and 405B share architectural family (Llama-3.1 dense, hybrid-think head) — 70B is sufficient archetype.
If operator wants larger archetype later, switching the slot is a single-file edit in MODEL-ID-SLOT.md.
